metadata.name: Traefik IPAllowList Middleware
metadata.description: Traefik Middleware CRD for restricting access to trusted source CIDR ranges, with optional client IP strategy controls for proxied deployments.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a Traefik Middleware resource for `ipAllowList` so only trusted source ranges can access the attached routes.

## Prerequisites
- Traefik must be installed with the Kubernetes CRD provider enabled.
- Confirm the source ranges and proxy chain match the actual client IP behavior in your environment.

## Apply
- Render `main.yaml`, review the source ranges and optional IP strategy settings, then apply it with `kubectl apply -f main.yaml`.
- Attach the middleware to one non-critical route first so you can confirm clients are evaluated as expected.

## Follow-Up
- Test from an allowed IP and a denied IP before using the middleware on admin or dashboard routes.
- Revisit the IP strategy settings if you place Traefik behind another reverse proxy or load balancer.

## References
- [IPAllowList Middleware](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/middlewares/http/ipallowlist/)
- [Traefik Kubernetes CRD](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/routing/providers/kubernetes-crd/)

variables.name: resource_name
variables.title: Middleware name
variables.description: Name to use for the Middleware resource.

variables.name: source_ranges
variables.title: Source ranges
variables.description: Comma-separated list of CIDR ranges allowed to access the route.

variables.name: ip_strategy_depth_enabled
variables.title: Depth strategy
variables.description: Evaluate the client IP based on a specific position in the X-Forwarded-For chain.

variables.name: ip_strategy_depth
variables.title: Depth
variables.description: Position from the right in the X-Forwarded-For chain.

variables.name: excluded_ips_enabled
variables.title: Excluded IPs
variables.description: Exclude trusted proxy IPs from client IP evaluation.

variables.name: excluded_ips
variables.title: Excluded IPs list
variables.description: Comma-separated list of trusted proxy ranges to ignore during client IP evaluation.
